overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a foggy coastal cliff path during a stormy dusk. The player holds a spear and passes lantern posts and a stone building while lightning strikes in the distance, creating an atmospheric horror-fantasy mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with lantern lighting

events.description: stone building with warm interior lights comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path holding a spear, approaching a stone building on the left

entered.detail: ornate iron street lamp with warm yellow glow illuminating the fog
rustic wooden railing along the cliff edge
steep coastal drop-off with ocean visible below
small stone cottage with glowing windows nestled against the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a foggy coastal trail at dusk, with a lit lantern post on the left and a wooden fence guarding the cliff edge on the right. As the character walks forward, a stone building with warm interior lights emerges from the mist on the left, creating a focal point against the cool blue storm sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing the stone building along the fenced coastal path

events.description: slight turn to the right as the path curves around the building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing the stone building on the left while maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: faint warm lights visible through the fog in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the stone building, which falls behind on the left. The wooden fence continues along the right side, now closer to the camera. Distant lights become visible through the fog ahead, suggesting a destination or settlement further along the coastal path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal overlook with storm approaching

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the storm clouds in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the open coastal path as lightning strikes in the distance ahead

entered.detail: bright white lightning bolt flashing through the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal a wider coastal view with the ocean visible on the right. The environment becomes darker as the storm intensifies, culminating in a dramatic lightning strike at 44 seconds that briefly illuminates the foggy sky. The wooden fence continues along the cliff edge, and pine trees become more prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail approaching distant settlement lights

agents.ego_description: continuing through the forested section of the trail toward the distant lights

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense pine forest

segments.scene_description: After the lightning strike, the character continues along a more forested section of the trail. The wooden fence and cliff edge fade from view as the path turns slightly inland. Dense pine trees flank both sides of the trail, and the distant lights remain visible ahead through the fog, guiding the way forward through the stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a foggy coastal trail that gradually shifts from an open cliffside path into a dense, stormy forest. It begins by passing a lit lantern post and a wooden fence at the cliff's edge, moving toward a stone building with warm interior lights that glow against a cool blue dusk sky. As the camera moves past the building, the path opens to reveal the ocean on the right and distant lights flickering through the mist, just before a dramatic lightning strike briefly illuminates the intensifying storm. The scene then shifts as the trail turns inland, causing the cliff edge and fence to fade from view while thick pine trees begin to flank both sides of the path. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the darkening woods, guided by the persistent glow of the distant lights through the heavy fog.
